heading: Capacity building in foreign fisheries
label: 8018 Capacity building in foreign fisheries
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Don Young Coast Guard Authorization Act of 2022 and also as part of the James M. Inhofe National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2023, and not as part of the Maritime Security and Fisheries Enforcement Act or the Maritime SAFE Act which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definitions of terms used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 11329 of div. K of Pub. L. 117–263section 1885a of this title

children.text: multi-year international environmental cooperation agreements and projects; and
multi-year capacity-building projects for implementing measures to address illegal, unreported, or unregulated fishing, fraud, forced labor, bycatch, and other conservation measures.
